goal: Repair conversational OCS workflow selection so cognition-intended human prompts route consistently to OCS_LLM_COGNITION.

root_cause.reason: The predicate recognized first real AiGOL product but did not recognize the equivalent first real commercial Sapianta product cognition prompt. The question-start path also checked for '?' after punctuation had already been stripped.

classification_entry.summary: Preserves original question punctuation state and passes ends_with_question into OCS classification before falling through to unrelated workflow predicates.

ocs_predicate.summary: Adds narrow Sapianta/AiGOL governed-cognition markers and restores question-start cognition routing without changing the normalized text used by other workflow checks.

preserved_exclusion.summary: Domain creation prompts containing domain plus create/new/add remain excluded from OCS routing.

workflow_selection.assertion: The exact prompt 'I want to create the first real commercial Sapianta product.' routes to OCS_LLM_COGNITION and reconstructs workflow selection replay with the same workflow.

routing_visibility.assertion: Interactive routing visibility displays and replays OCS_LLM_COGNITION for the exact prompt.

dispatch.assertion: The exact prompt dispatches to OCS_LLM_COGNITION_END_TO_END and records conversational_workflow_id OCS_LLM_COGNITION.
